description: Access to PC or Client optical vision to take snapshots of the environment or Admin. Can trigger the user's own smartphone or remote browser camera.

commands.take_snapshot: Takes a photo using the local server webcam (target='server') or the user's own client device camera (target='client').

function.name: WEBCAM__take_snapshot
function.description: Takes a photo. Use target='server' for the local PC webcam (default). Use target='client' ONLY when the user explicitly asks to take a photo from their phone or remote browser - this opens the device's native camera app and auto-uploads the image.

target.description: Where to take the photo from. 'server' = local PC webcam. 'client' = user's own device (phone/browser camera).
